CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value1 Int32, value2 Int32);
SELECT id, bitXor(value1, value2) AS result FROM test_table;
SELECT id, bitXor(value1, 1) AS result FROM test_table WHERE value2 = 5;
SELECT id, bitXor(value1, (SELECT max(value2) FROM test_table)) AS result FROM test_table;
SELECT id, bitXor(value1, bitXor(value2, 2)) AS result FROM test_table HAVING result > 0;
CREATE TABLE another_table (key Int32, val Int32);
SELECT a.id, bitXor(a.value1, b.val) AS combined_result FROM test_table a JOIN another_table b ON a.id = b.key;
SELECT bitXor(value1, value2) AS result FROM (SELECT value1, value2 FROM test_table WHERE id = 1 UNION SELECT value1, value2 FROM test_table WHERE id = 2);
SELECT id, bitXor(value1, bitXor(value2, (SELECT avg(value1) FROM test_table))) AS advanced_result FROM test_table;
